name: Lavigne Bus Co Inc
districts_or_customers: Jefferson County ADRC referrals; private-pay seniors; Medicaid NEMT; nursing home & dialysis runs in SE Wisconsin
recent_news: No M&A or growth news identified; longstanding NEMT VAN provider (NPI 1225242209) operating from Fort Atkinson; despite 'Bus Co' name, services are medical/wheelchair van transport, not yellow-bus school routes.
fit_notes: NOT a Summit tuck-in target. Despite legacy 'Bus Co' name, the company is a non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) operator running wheelchair vans for seniors/disabled, with no school-district contracts identified. Out of scope for student-transportation platform.

name: Cabulance Inc
owner_or_parent: independent (affiliated with Oshkosh City Cab Co.)
service_types: paratransit (GO Plus contractor for City of Oshkosh)
districts_or_customers: City of Oshkosh GO Transit (GO Plus paratransit contract); private NEMT; not a school-district contractor
recent_news: No M&A news identified. Continues to provide GO Plus accessible paratransit under City of Oshkosh transit; operated alongside Oshkosh City Cab.
website: not confirmed (Facebook page exists at facebook.com/oshkoshcitycab)
fit_notes: NOT a Summit tuck-in target. Cabulance is a NEMT/paratransit/taxi operator (sister company to Oshkosh City Cab) without school-district yellow-bus routes. Wrong asset class for student-transportation platform.

name: Transtar Medical LTD
districts_or_customers: Southeast Wisconsin NEMT (Washington, Kenosha, Jefferson, Fond du Lac ADRC referrals); hospital discharge/medical appointment runs; no K-12 school-district contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. Registered government vendor (SAM/govtribe). 28+ years operating; founder still owner/operator.
website: not confirmed (BBB profile, no standalone site found)
fit_notes: NOT a Summit tuck-in target. Pure NEMT operator (name literally 'Medical'), serving seniors/disabled with wheelchair vans. No school-bus or SPED contracts identified. Out of scope.

name: Curative Transportation Svc
founded_year: unknown (Curative Care Network parent dates to mid-20th century)
service_types: specialized transportation for adults with disabilities
districts_or_customers: Milwaukee/Waukesha county human-services clients of Curative Care Network; paratransit/day-program routes; not a school-district yellow-bus contractor
recent_news: No M&A activity. Operates as the transportation arm of Curative Care Network, a long-standing Milwaukee-area 501(c)(3) serving people with disabilities; sister org Curative Connections runs comparable service in Brown County.
fit_notes: NOT a Summit tuck-in target. This is the transportation department of a non-profit (Curative Care Network) serving adults with disabilities — not an independent privately-owned school-bus contractor. Non-profit ownership + wrong service mix make it un-acquirable for a PE-backed yellow-bus platform.

name: Amera-Care Transport Inc
districts_or_customers: Milwaukee County medical/Medicaid NEMT clients; no school-district contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. 40+ year-old founder-led NEMT operator (NPI 1205019015) in Milwaukee; owner Joanne Angelici likely at/near retirement age (succession signal high if she were in scope).
fit_notes: NOT a Summit tuck-in target. Despite a high succession signal and long tenure, Amera-Care is a non-emergency medical wheelchair-van operator, not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Wrong service line for student-transportation platform.
